question: Will Sm metal (Western) spot price exceed 100 USD/kg on May 31, 2026?
reason: Samarium metal prices have remained well below $100/kg in recent years.
evidence: As of May 19, 2026, samarium metal 99.5% min was priced at $10.44/kg in EXW China. ([scrapmonster.com](https://www.scrapmonster.com/metal-prices/rare-earth/samarium/953?utm_source=openai))
On May 20, 2026, samarium metal 99.5% min was priced at $9,713.26/tonne ($9.71/kg) in China. ([www-old.metal.com](https://www-old.metal.com/Rare-Earth-Metals/?utm_source=openai))
In March 2026, samarium prices in Northeast Asia reached $10.45/kg, with a 3.0% increase from December 2025. ([imarcgroup.com](https://www.imarcgroup.com/samarium-pricing-report?utm_source=openai))
searchQueries: Samarium metal (Sm) spot price May 2026 Western market
